## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint`, `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm test`, and `pnpm build` pass
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change (coverage stays ≥ 80%)
- [ ] Generated types regenerated (`pnpm gen`) if the spec changed
- [ ] A changeset added (`pnpm changeset`) if this affects published behavior
- [ ] Docs / README updated if the public API changed
